message:
Fix beads-view loading failures: error spinner hang, script race condition

Three fixes in the React-based BeadsView component:

1. setLoading(false) on error: When loadDatabase() threw, the loading state
   was never cleared, leaving users stuck on an infinite loading spinner with
   no way to see the error message. Now the catch block properly transitions
   to the error state.

2. Script load race on navigation back: When a user navigates away and
   returns, sql-wasm.js may already be in the global scope (window.initSqlJs)
   but the <Script> onLoad callback won't re-fire for an already-loaded script.
   Added a useEffect that detects this case and calls loadDatabase() directly.

3. Moved <Script> tags into the loading-state render path: Previously, the
   sql-wasm.js and force-graph.min.js Script tags only appeared in the main
   render (after loading=false), meaning they couldn't trigger onLoad during
   the loading phase when they're actually needed. Now they render in both
   states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
